use_cases: Displaying single digits in digital clock or timer interfaces with a retro seven-segment aesthetic
Rendering numeric values in monitoring dashboards and status indicators
Creating vintage-style price or score displays in e-commerce and gaming applications
Showing countdown and timer values in process-heavy applications
ai_summary: A minimalist SVG-based seven-segment numeric display component that renders digits 0-9 in classic LED/LCD digital clock style. Supports customizable on/off colors for creating retro-styled numeric displays in dashboards, timers, counters, and vintage-themed interfaces.
